Admissions.familySectionHint: Link to an existing family (for siblings) or leave blank for a new one.
Admissions.parentSectionHint: At least one contact recommended. More can be added later.
Admissions.enrollDescription: Choose a class and an enrollment date. The child will be created as a student and parents will be linked as contact persons.
Admissions.deleteConfirm: This will permanently delete the application (including its history). Continue?
Admissions.addStageHint: Create additional stages (e.g. Interest, Application, Interview, Accepted, Enrolled, Rejected). They are persisted in the database and configurable per organization.
Admissions.stageSlugInvalid: Invalid name (needs at least one letter or digit)
Admissions.stageArchiveConfirm: Archive stage? It will disappear from the kanban (applications remain).
Admissions.rejectionReasonsHint: Reusable reasons selectable when rejecting an application.
Admissions.rejectionReasonArchiveConfirm: Archive this reason? It will no longer be selectable.
Admissions.notAuthorized: You do not have access to this page.
Admissions.cardFieldsHint: Choose which info appears on this stage's cards. Name and avatar are always shown.
Admissions.tableColumnsHint: Choose the columns for the table view. Applies to the whole organization. The "Child" column is always shown.
Admissions.reminderTitlePlaceholder: e.g. Call mother back, check paperwork …
Admissions.remindersPageSubtitle: Open tasks and follow-ups from the admissions pipeline
Admissions.emailSendDescription: Pick a template, adjust it in the editor and send. The send is tracked.

Forbidden.title: Access denied
Forbidden.description: This area is reserved for administrative roles. Teachers, students, parents and employees cannot access it.

EmailTemplates.pageSubtitle: Create and manage templates for the admissions process
EmailTemplates.emptyState: No templates yet. Create your first template.
EmailTemplates.name: Name
EmailTemplates.subject: Subject
EmailTemplates.dialogDescription: Placeholders like {{childFirstName}} are replaced automatically when sending.
EmailTemplates.smtpSubtitle: SMTP credentials for sending email. Recommended: a Swiss provider (e.g. Infomaniak).
EmailTemplates.smtpSecureHint: On for port 465, off for STARTTLS (587).

Common.name: Name
Common.createOrganizationDescription: Create an organization with an owner.
Common.createEmployeeDescription: Create a new employee with the required information.
Common.createAbsenceNoticeDescription: Create an absence notice to inform administration and management about your absence.
Common.absenceNoteDescription: Add a message to inform administration and management about the reason for your absence.
Common.deleteConfirmDescription: This action cannot be undone. This will permanently delete {itemName}.
Common.title: Title
Common.createUserDescription: Create a new user with the required information.
Common.confidentialDescription: Only visible to HR and administrators

Employees.filterByName: Search by first or last name
Employees.selectOrganizationFirst: Please select an organization from the sidebar first.
Employees.csvImportDescription: Import employees from a CSV file. Existing email addresses will be skipped.
Employees.csvFormatInfo: The CSV file must use semicolons (;) as separator and contain the following columns:
Employees.csvEmpty: The CSV file is empty or contains no data
Employees.historyDescription: All changes that have been made to this profile.

emergency.sensitiveNotice: This data is highly sensitive — for emergencies only.

EmployeeNotes.confidentialDescription: Only visible to HR and administrators
EmployeeNotes.logbookDescription: Notes, meetings, warnings and special requests

SchoolClasses.selectOrganizationFirst: Please select an organization in the sidebar first.
SchoolClasses.manageGradeLevelsDescription: Create and manage the grade levels for your organization.
SchoolClasses.gradeLevelInUseTooltip: This grade level is assigned to a class and cannot be deleted

Teams.teamsDescription: Create teams and assign employees to them.
Teams.name: Name
Teams.selectOrganizationFirst: Please select an organization in the sidebar first.
Teams.dropOnRowHint: Drop onto a team to nest it, or between teams to reorder.

GradeLevels.manageGradeLevelsDescription: Create, sort and rename the grade levels for your organization. Classes can be assigned to one or more grade levels.
GradeLevels.name: Name
GradeLevels.selectOrganizationFirst: Please select an organization in the sidebar first.
GradeLevels.gradeLevelInUseTooltip: This grade level is assigned to a class and cannot be deleted.

Students.selectOrganizationFirst: Please select an organization in the sidebar first.
Students.confirmRemoveLink: Are you sure you want to remove this link?
Students.csvImportDescription: Import students from a CSV or Excel file.
Students.csvFormatInfo: The file must use semicolon (;) as delimiter and contain the following columns:
Students.csvInvalidFormat: Only CSV or Excel files allowed

ContactPersons.csvImportDescription: Import contact persons from a CSV or Excel file.
ContactPersons.csvFormatInfo: The file must use semicolon (;) as delimiter and contain the following columns:
ContactPersons.csvInvalidFormat: Only CSV or Excel files allowed

Curricula.name: Name
Curricula.noLevelsYet: No levels yet. Import a curriculum to create levels automatically.
Curricula.noNodesYet: No nodes in this level yet.
Curricula.editTranslationsHint: Maintain name and notes per locale. Each language is saved individually.
Curricula.importDescription: Upload an Excel or CSV file. You will see a preview first and can then commit the import.
Curricula.importFormatHint: The first row may be a title; headers are auto-detected within the first five rows.
Curricula.importMultiSheetHint: Multi-language: one tab per locale (DE/FR/IT/EN). Tab "DE" is required and defines the structure; other tabs add translations. The "Sequence" column joins rows across languages (same number = same lesson).
Curricula.archiveCurriculumDescription: The curriculum will be hidden and can be restored later.
Curricula.archiveNodeDescription: The entry and all its sub-items will be hidden and can be restored later.
Curricula.hardDeleteCurriculumDescription: “{name}” and all of its areas, topics, groups, lessons and translations will be removed from the database. This cannot be undone.

Roles.title: Roles & Permissions
Roles.description: Manage permissions per role in your organization.
Roles.permissionsCount: {count, plural, =0 {No permissions} one {# permission} other {# permissions}}

CountryTemplates.title: Country Templates
CountryTemplates.subtitle: Pick a country to manage masks for phone, SSN and postal code. IBAN is globally standardized and hardcoded.
CountryTemplates.addCountryDescription: Pick a country from the list. You'll be taken to the detail page to manage masks per field.
CountryTemplates.maskHint: Syntax: 9 = digit, a = letter, * = alphanumeric. Other characters literal.

OrganizationSettings.valueDescription: Only fill in if the value should change
OrganizationSettings.descriptionPlaceholder: What is this key used for?
OrganizationSettings.editDescription: Update the value or description for
OrganizationSettings.deleteDescriptionStart: Are you sure you want to delete the setting

StudentsKanban.title: Classroom Assignment
StudentsKanban.subtitle: Drag a child to a different classroom. The current enrollment ends today; the new one starts today.

RecordKeeping.title: Record Keeping
RecordKeeping.subtitle: Pick a lesson, then choose the children from a classroom who took part, and set the status.
RecordKeeping.noAttentionItems: No items needing attention — all green.
RecordKeeping.studentsSubtitle: Click on a student to view their full progress.
RecordKeeping.selectClassFirst: Pick a class first to see the students.
RecordKeeping.observationDefaultHelp: These values apply to every selected child. You can override individual children below.
RecordKeeping.observationPerChildHelp: Tap a child to override observation badges for that child only.
RecordKeeping.observationPerChildNotePlaceholder: Optional: short observation about this child only…
RecordKeeping.observationChildTapsSelfHelp: When on, hides all other axes and marks the self-assessment as recorded by the child.
RecordKeeping.observationLessonClarity: Lesson goal was clear to the child
RecordKeeping.observationSectionTeacherSelfHint: How was your own state in this lesson?
RecordKeeping.observationOverridesPartialFailureToast: Some per-child adjustments could not be saved
RecordKeeping.recordsCreated: {count, plural, one {One entry} other {# entries}} saved
RecordKeeping.prerequisitesDescription: Define which lessons must be completed before this one is suggested.
RecordKeeping.cycleDetected: This selection would create a cycle.
RecordKeeping.noNextLessons: No open lessons — all prerequisites available or mastered.
RecordKeeping.heatmapSubtitle: Overview of each child's progress per area in a classroom. Numbers show mastered / tracked lessons.
RecordKeeping.radarSubtitle: Cumulative view: each layer shows the share of tracked lessons that reached at least this level (MASTERED ⊆ PRACTICED ⊆ INTRODUCED). NEEDS_MORE is a warning flag (dashed). Click a status to toggle the layer.
RecordKeeping.radarNotEnoughData: Not enough areas with entries yet for a radar view (at least 3 needed).
RecordKeeping.radarSubtitleCurriculum: Share of all lessons in the area that have reached at least this level. Click a status to toggle the layer.
RecordKeeping.lifecycleSectionSubtitle: How long does a lesson take from introduction to mastery?
RecordKeeping.noLifecycleData: No records yet — once a lesson is introduced, it will appear here.
RecordKeeping.lifecycleListSubtitle: Sorted by current status. Dots show milestones Introduced → Practiced → Mastered.
RecordKeeping.areaPaceSubtitle: Avg days Introduced → Mastered per area
RecordKeeping.reinputDistSubtitle: Lessons by number of NEEDS_MORE events
RecordKeeping.stuckListSubtitle: Lessons longest in practice without mastery
RecordKeeping.radarSubtitleInPeriod: Share of lessons started in the period per area that reached at least this level. Click a status to toggle the layer.
RecordKeeping.radarCaption: {lessons, plural, =0 {No lessons} one {1 lesson} other {# lessons}} across {areas, plural, =0 {0 areas} one {1 area} other {# areas}} in the active window.
RecordKeeping.radarSubtitleDistribution: Denominator = the subject with the most tracked lessons in the period. Other subjects scale proportionally — at a glance you see where the child focused and where activity was low.
RecordKeeping.attentionSubtitle: Lessons with warning signals — sorted by urgency.
RecordKeeping.attentionReasonBigGap: Long gap from introduction to practice ({days}d)
RecordKeeping.attentionClassroomSubtitle: Classroom overview — number of warning lessons per child.
RecordKeeping.attentionNoData: No warning signals in this classroom yet.
RecordKeeping.learningStanceCardNotEnoughData: Not enough observation data for this card yet.
RecordKeeping.learningStanceConcentrationHint: Share of flow / partial focus / interrupted across all observations.
RecordKeeping.learningStanceZpdHint: Share of «productive challenge» — Vygotsky's Zone of Proximal Development.
RecordKeeping.learningStancePersistenceHint: Per week: persists / seeks help / gives up. Help-seeking is positive (Hattie d ≈ 0.72).
RecordKeeping.learningStanceRadarHint: 5 axes, each showing share of positive observations. Needs longitudinal data.
RecordKeeping.learningStanceRadarNotEnough: Not enough observation data yet ({have} of {need}). The profile will appear once enough lessons are recorded.
RecordKeeping.learningStanceCalibrationHint: Hattie #1 (d=1.33). How realistic are the child's self-ratings? Compared against later status.
RecordKeeping.learningStanceCalibrationNotEnough: Not enough self-assessments yet ({have} of {need}). Calibration becomes meaningful once the child has self-tapped a few times.
RecordKeeping.notesTimelineNoMatches: No matches for the search term.
RecordKeeping.timelineStudentSubtitle: How many new introductions, practice and mastery entries this child receives over time.
RecordKeeping.timelineClassroomSubtitle: Share of observed engagement levels over time — surfaces dips, post-break slumps and recoveries.
RecordKeeping.timelineIntroductionsInRange: {count, plural, one {# introduction} other {# introductions}} in range
RecordKeeping.timelineDaysSinceLastIntro: Last introduction {days, plural, one {# day} other {# days}} ago
RecordKeeping.timelineEmpty: No data in the selected range yet.

RecordKeepingSettings.pageSubtitle: Decide when a lesson shows up in the «Needs attention» list. Applies org-wide.
RecordKeepingSettings.introducedStuckDaysHelp: Default: 30. Lesson is flagged if no practice record follows within this window.
RecordKeepingSettings.practicedStuckDaysHelp: Default: 90. Lesson stays in practice without a mastery record.
RecordKeepingSettings.bigGapDaysHelp: Default: 60. Historical pause between introduction and first practice.

Impersonation.title: Log in as a teacher
Impersonation.subtitle: SuperAdmin only. Click «Function» → «Log in as …» opens a new tab as that person. The current tab's session is replaced — refresh to log in as that person here too.
Impersonation.currentTabHint: Refresh this tab to return to the SuperAdmin session.

Auth.magicLinkError: Failed to send the login link.
Auth.magicLinkDescription: We'll email you a login link. No password needed.
Auth.termsStart: By signing in you accept our

AbsenceCategories.pageSubtitle: Manage the reasons for absences in your organization
AbsenceCategories.systemCategoryNote: System category: cannot be deleted, but behavior, limits, translations and display can all be customised.
AbsenceCategories.countsAsWorkTimeHelp: Counts toward the work hours target like actual work.
AbsenceCategories.affectsVacationBalanceHelp: Subtracts days from vacation quota (e.g. unpaid leave).
AbsenceCategories.defaultIsVacationCapableHelp: When off, overlapping vacation days will be credited back (typical for sickness). Can be overridden per booking.
AbsenceCategories.requiresCertificateHelp: A medical certificate or similar proof must be uploaded.
AbsenceCategories.defaultPercentageHelp: 100 = full day; 50 for half-day sick leave, etc.
AbsenceCategories.certificateRequiredFromDayHelp: CH standard for sickness: from day 3.
AbsenceCategories.reducesVacationEntitlementAfterDaysHelp: CO Art. 329b — reduces vacation entitlement after this many sick days. Empty = no reduction.
AbsenceCategories.archiveDescription: Archive "{name}"? Existing absences are kept, but the category cannot be selected anymore.
AbsenceCategories.sortOrderMovedToList: Note: order is managed via drag-and-drop on the list.

Projects.pageSubtitle: Plan recurring school processes, assign tasks and get them done.
Projects.projectFormSubtitle: Title, description and status of the project.
Projects.title: Title
Projects.noProjects: No projects yet. Create your first project.
Projects.deleteProjectDescription: The project and all its tasks will be removed. This action cannot be undone.
Projects.myTasksSubtitle: All tasks assigned to you across every project.
Projects.personalTaskSubtitle: A personal task just for you (not tied to a project).
